output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-127","author":"Mara_Stone","text":"Just stumbled across this and it's giving me major creeps! Someone shared a map link in their bio that shows exactly where they live and then another post listing their whole daily routine - wake up time, commute, work address, even when they get home. They're posting from the same location every day. This feels like stalking or doxxing to me. Is this normal sharing behaviour? #Privacy","category":"Privacy","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post reports the exposure of another person's private live location and daily routine, which falls under PrivacySensitiveInfo.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"PrivacySensitiveInfo","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":"","followerCount":"","followingCount":"","verifiedStatus":"","postCount":"","bio":"","previousFlags":"","location":"","platform":"","isStoryPost:false}]}
